items.title: This Software Company Saw Significant High-Value Client Additions And An Upbeat Q4 – Stock Shot Up 17% Pre-Market Today
items.description: Datadog added considerable high-value clients, ending the year with 603 customers generating $1 million or more in annual recurring revenue.

items.title: AZI Stock Reverses Early Gains To Slump 30% In Pre-Market – What Happened?
items.description: The company said it completed negotiations to acquire around $1.87 billion worth of premium digital assets from Crypto Titan for about $1.1 billion.
